sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6127" key="a)mfi/flasma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφί-φλασμα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφι-φλάω</orth>, <sense id="n6127.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-θλασμα, -θλάω.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
